name: @tsuuanmi/pi-workflows
description: Workflow runtime skills for Pi: deep-interview, ralplan, team, and ultragoal

scripts.copy-assets: shx mkdir -p dist/skills/deep-interview dist/skills/ralplan dist/skills/team dist/skills/ultragoal dist/agents && shx cp src/skills/deep-interview/SKILL.md dist/skills/deep-interview/ && shx cp src/skills/ralplan/SKILL.md dist/skills/ralplan/ && shx cp src/skills/team/SKILL.md dist/skills/team/ && shx cp src/skills/ultragoal/SKILL.md dist/skills/ultragoal/ && shx cp src/agents/*.md dist/agents/
